subject: AirDrop not discovering nearby devices
description: User tries to AirDrop a photo to a nearby colleague's iPhone but neither device sees the other in the share sheet.

ts_steps.title: Contacts Only path
ts_steps.action: If used — both signed into iCloud and in each other Contacts.

ts_steps.title: Distance
ts_steps.action: Within ~9 m; remove metal cases test.

ts_steps.title: Focus modes
ts_steps.action: Allow AirDrop or disable Focus test.

ts_steps.title: Reset Network Settings
ts_steps.action: One device then other if still fail.

ts_steps.title: MDM
ts_steps.action: Verify profile does not disable AirDrop.

internal_information: Hotspot, VPN, AWDL, MDM, distance, Focus.
